title: RNA Extraction for RIN and DV 200 Analysis
author: Jamie Allen
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.86nhzde
materials: Move supernatant to a new 1.5 mL tube.
Discard supernatant and add 600 μL 80% Ethanol.

steps.title: Place tissue section in 750 μL of TRIzoILS
steps.instruction: Place tissue section in 750 μL of TRIzoILS.

steps.title: Homogenize the sample
steps.instruction: Homogenize the sample: Use a homogenizer or pass sample through a 23G then a 27G needle syringe.

steps.title: Freeze samples on dry ice and re-thaw once
steps.instruction: Freeze samples on dry ice and re-thaw once. Mix well by vortexing.

steps.title: Add RNase free water to a...
steps.instruction: Add RNase free water to a final volume of 960 μL.

steps.title: Add 40 μL of glycogen solution...
steps.instruction: Add 40 μL of glycogen solution (5mg/mL, making a final conc of 200 μg/mL of glycogen) to each tube and mix well.

steps.title: Centrifuge Phase Lock Gel to move...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge Phase Lock Gel to move gel to the bottom of column (12,000 x g for 5 minutes). Then transfer the TRIzol mixture mixture to the column.

steps.title: Incubate for 5 minutes at 20 o C (room temperature)
steps.instruction: Incubate for 5 minutes at 20 o C (room temperature).

steps.title: Add 250 μL of chloroform and shake for 15 seconds
steps.instruction: Add 250 μL of chloroform and shake for 15 seconds.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 12,000 x g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 12,000 x g for 10 minutes at 4 o C.

steps.title: Add 600 μL isopropanol
steps.instruction: Add 600 μL isopropanol.

steps.title: Vortex and incubate the tube at...
steps.instruction: Vortex and incubate the tube at -20 o C for 20 minutes.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 20,000 x g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 20,000 x g for 20 minutes at 4 o C.

steps.title: Add 300 μLof RLT plus buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 300 μLof RLT plus buffer (from Qiagen RNeasy Plus Micro Kit) containing 2-ME (10 μL of 2-ME for 1 mL of RLT Plus Buffer, 1% 2-ME) and mix.

steps.title: Vortex and centrifuge at 20,000 x...
steps.instruction: Vortex and centrifuge at 20,000 x g for 5 minutes at 4 o C

steps.title: Discard supernatant and air dry for a few minutes
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant and air dry for a few minutes.

steps.title: Add 450 μL 100% ethanol (1
steps.instruction: Add 450 μL 100% ethanol (1.5 volumes) and mix well.

steps.title: Transfer 750 μLof the sample to...
steps.instruction: Transfer 750 μLof the sample to RNeasy MinElute spin column and centrifuge for 1 min at 12,000 x g at 24 o C.

steps.title: Transfer the collected flow through back...
steps.instruction: Transfer the collected flow through back through the same column and centrifuge for 1 min at 12,000 x g at 24 o C. (This is a double application of sample). This time discard the flow.

steps.title: Add 500 μL of RPE buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 500 μL of RPE buffer to the column and centrifuge at 12,000 x g for 1 min at 24 o C.

steps.title: Discard flow through and add 500...
steps.instruction: Discard flow through and add 500 μL RPE buffer to the column. Centrifuge at 12,000 x g for 2 min at 24 o C.

steps.title: Transfer column to a new collection tube
steps.instruction: Transfer column to a new collection tube. Discard the old collection tube with the flow through.

steps.title: Open the lid of the column...
steps.instruction: Open the lid of the column and centrifuge at 12,000 x g for 5 min at 24 o C to dry up the column membrane completely.

steps.title: Place the column in a new 1
steps.instruction: Place the column in a new 1.5 mL tube and add 10 uL of RNase free water on the center of the column membrane. Incubate for 2 min at 20 o C.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 12,000 x g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 12,000 x g for 3 min at 24 o C.

steps.title: Add 10 uL of RNase free...
steps.instruction: Add 10 uL of RNase free water again on the center of the column membrane and incubate for 2 min at 20 o C.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 12,000 x g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 12,000 x g for 3 min at 24 o C (this is a double elution).

steps.title: Provide VANTAGE Core with 10 uL...
steps.instruction: Provide VANTAGE Core with 10 uL of solution for RIN and DV 200 analysis.
